Compliance.description: Licensed SA operation under Imperial/THL Group; CPA compliant; no major 2025/2026 violations.

Customer Satisfaction.description: HelloPeter 2.5/5; mixed reviews on service; some positive experiences at major locations.

Product Value.description: Competitive pricing; good fleet; Gold Plus loyalty; various packages.

Innovation.description: App booking; Gold Plus loyalty; Hertz My Car app; various tech integrations.

Customer Support.description: Phone/online/app; variable service quality per reviews.

Accessibility & Security.description: App available; national coverage; standard practices.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: From ~R320/day economy; Gold Plus member discounts

socialSentiment.summary: Mixed; brand recognition positive but service complaints common.
